source_papers.title: Serum Dipeptidyl Peptidase 4: A Predictor of Disease Activity and Prognosis in Inflammatory Bowel Disease

A comparative study of the binding properties, dipeptidyl peptidase‐4 (<scp>DPP</scp>‐4) inhibitory activity and glucose‐lowering efficacy of the <scp>DPP</scp>‐4 inhibitors alogliptin, linagliptin, saxagliptin, sitagliptin and vildagliptin in mice
Overview of Glucagon-Like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists for the Treatment of Patients with Type 2 Diabetes.

extracted_claims.context: in biologically treated inflammatory bowel disease patients
extracted_claims.subject: DPP-4

scoring.formula: score = min((log(ab+1) + log(bc+1)) * novelty / 10, 1.0); novelty = 1.0 if direct==0 else 0.7 / (direct+1)
